channel.title: Majestic 12 on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Majestic 12 on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Majestic 12
item.description:
Majestic 12, also known as Majic-12 or MJ-12, is a purported organization that emerged in fake documents circulated by ufologists in 1984. These documents claim it was a secret committee formed in 1947 by President Harry S. Truman to investigate alien spacecraft. The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has declared these documents “completely bogus,” and many consider them a hoax. Despite this, the concept remains popular in UFO conspiracy theories and has appeared in various forms of popular culture.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Majestic_12

item.title: UFO Coverup? Live
item.description:
UFO Coverup? Live was a US television broadcast that aired on October 14, 1988, and introduced the Majestic 12 hoax and Area 51 to Americans. Hosted by Mike Farrell, the program discussed various UFO incidents and featured interviews with ufologists, pilots, and skeptics. It also included clips from films with alien themes and presented claims from informants about aliens and a government agreement for an Area 51 base. The program later faced criticism for its truthfulness and was noted for influencing The X-Files.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_Cover_Up%3F_Live
